title: maesa calophylla
intro: Maesa calophylla, also known as the "Kadupul flower" or "Queen of the Night", is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its various health benefits, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant's medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which make it effective in relieving congestion and coughs. Maesa calophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and uses.
